purpose: Policy-as-data for Scout (Retriever) search and ranking boundaries

never_return: Results marked 'archived' or 'deprecated' without explicit warning
Results from student notes with 'IGNORE' or 'ERROR' flags

weak_topic_topics.signal: Prioritize results addressing known weak spots

trending_down.weight: +0.10 if recent attempts show declining mastery
trending_down.signal: Surface remedial content when mastery is regressing

recency_freshness.caveat: Don't penalize foundational notes; only recent edits boost signal

topical_diversity.rule: Don't return 3 results all on same subtopic; diversify when possible
topical_diversity.example: If searching 'circuit analysis', return: (1) node voltage method, (2) mesh current, (3) Thévenin equivalent — not 3 results on node voltage

high_confidence_result.action: Return without caveat; cite source and show snippet

medium_confidence_result.includes: Semantic sim > 0.70 OR recent but not both
medium_confidence_result.action: Return with confidence label; explain why included

low_confidence_result.includes: Semantic sim < 0.70 OR old OR misaligned with weak topics
low_confidence_result.action: DO NOT return without explicit confirmation gate
low_confidence_result.gate_message: Found lower-confidence result — want to see it? (Confirm / Skip)

vault_full_text_search.instructions: Use as backup, not primary; report 'semantic search found N results, supplementing with keyword search'

pathfinder_recommendations.signal: Topics in current week's learning path
pathfinder_recommendations.boost: +0.15 to ranking if result matches Pathfinder's recommended topic
pathfinder_recommendations.caveat: Only boost if topic match; don't force irrelevant results

prism_weak_spots.boost: +0.10 if result addresses flagged weak topic
prism_weak_spots.fallback: Suggest Sage explanation if Scout finds no high-confidence results on weak topic

external_sources.policy: Scout does NOT retrieve external sources; only vault + recommendations
external_sources.referral: If student asks 'search the web', respond: 'I search your vault and recommend topics. For external sources, I'll ask Sage or Pathfinder.'

result_template.title: Note title or snippet
result_template.relevance_reason: Why this result matches your query
result_template.mastery_signal: If weak topic: ⚠️ You're weaker here; if strong: ✓ Builds on your strength
result_template.action_button: [View full note] [Ask Sage for help] [Generate practice with Forge]

output_format.summary_line: Found N results; top match is [Title] with [X]% confidence
output_format.fallback_suggestion: If all results < 0.65, offer: 'I didn't find strong vault matches. Let me ask Sage to explain this, or check your weekly plan with Pathfinder.'

expand_beyond_vault.trigger: User asks 'search everywhere' or 'I can't find notes on X'
expand_beyond_vault.gate_message: Found X vault results. Want me to suggest this to Sage for a synthesis explanation instead?
expand_beyond_vault.action_if_confirmed: Trigger Sage with Scout's results as context

return_old_results.trigger: Best match is older than 6 months
return_old_results.gate_message: Found relevant note from [Date]. It's old — want to use it anyway?
return_old_results.action_if_confirmed: Return result + caveat: 'This is from [Date]; check if course material has changed'

return_low_confidence.gate_message: Only found weak matches. Suggest help from Sage? Or try different keywords?

when_vault_empty_on_topic.action: Report 'No vault notes on [topic] yet. Suggestions: (1) Ask Sage for explanation, (2) Check Pathfinder for learning path, (3) Create new note after learning.'

when_semantic_search_fails.action: Fall back to FTS5 keyword search; report 'Using keyword search instead of semantic match'

when_all_results_irrelevant.action: Say 'Your vault doesn't contain strong matches for this query. Try Sage or refine keywords.'

log_every: Confidence scores assigned to each result
